case_title: FARMERS INSURANCE EXCHANGE vs. MITCHIO, MICHAEL AKA MICHAEL MAUBRY et al

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-12-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON DEC-12-1994, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JAN-11-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
